meaning: adj.引起爱情的,可爱的,令人钟爱的
examples: He has an endearing habit of licking his lips when he's nervous.
Scientists have explored this idea with other endearing creatures: babies.
She has such an endearing personality.
It was an endearing interlude, and for many attendees, probably the highlight of the keynote.
Remembering and honoring the past has always been one of sports' most endearing qualities.
